channel.title: Authenticity on PepsFeeder
channel.description: Recent content in Authenticity on PepsFeeder

item.title: Psychological Resilience and Personal Growth: Why Discomfort, Boundaries, and Emotional Intelligence Shape a Better Life - Part 2
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: Don’t do these things just to please others We often try to show that we are perfect to be loved and accepted by society, but no one is perfect, and we cannot please everyone around us, nor should we try to do so.
